corrections.note: Printed text has dative ἄρκῳ, not genitive ἄρκου.

corrections.current: καὶ ἐποίει πόλεμον πρὸς τοὺς ἁγίους.
corrections.correct: καὶ ἐποίει πόλεμον πρὸς τοὺς ἁγίους.
corrections.note: This clause is absent from the body on the page and appears only in the apparatus as a variant/addition.
Printed apparatus has lowercase βουλαι, not mixed-case ΒΟΥλαι.
In the marginal note listing kingdoms, the first name is Αἰγύπτου, not αμυττουσι.
The next ethnonym is Λιβυων; transcript has a garbled reading split across line break.
The siglum citation shows uppercase ΔΙΑΥΤΟΥ; accenting/case in transcript may not match exactly, but image suggests standard uppercase without accent. Marked low confidence.

uncertain.location: APPARATUS line for 8, marginal note after 'τρια των κερατων'
uncertain.note: The explanatory note is small and cramped; while it clearly contains Αἰγυπτου Λιβυων Αἰθιοπων, the preceding verb phrase is difficult to read with full certainty.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly matches, but the final clause in v.8 was imported from the apparatus into the body. Apparatus also has a few transcription errors, including a garbled marginal note with kingdom names.
